candidate_definition_hints.text: This project implements the Proofs Sequential Work (PoSW) protocol construction defined in [Simple Proofs of Sequential Work](https://eprint.iacr.org/2018/183.pdf), which can be used as a proxy for Proof of Elapsed Time (PoET). We follow the paper's definitions, construction and…
